TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1984 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 8 a romi'ad masofoc ci Kim Jong-un , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Korea, north anini i ci Kim Jong-un, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 9 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i kim *o~uŇč-o~u~un , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ko~ur…ôa, no~urtńß anini i ¶i kim *o~uŇč-o~u~un, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1984 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 8 a romi'ad masofoc ci Kim Jong-un , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Korea, north anini i ci Kim Jong-un, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 9 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i kim *o~uŇč-o~u~un , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ko~ur…ôa, no~urtńß anini i ¶i kim *o~uŇč-o~u~un, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
